children.heading: Use of certain agencies
children.label: a Use of certain agencies
children.text: In carrying out this subpart, the Secretary may use the services of local committees of sugar beet or sugarcane producers, sugarcane processors, or sugar beet processors, State and county committees established under , and the departments and agencies of the United States Government.section 590h(b) of title 16

children.heading: Use of Commodity Credit Corporation
children.label: b Use of Commodity Credit Corporation
children.text: The Secretary shall use the services, facilities, funds, and authorities of the Commodity Credit Corporation to carry out this subpart.
